title: Xtra Indulgent Jamaican Eggs Frittata
description: A rich and flavorful Jamaican dish featuring free-range eggs, mustard, and gooey cheese, made with low-sodium ingredients and double-fry KFC technique for an indulgent breakfast treat.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Beat the eggs in a bowl and set aside.
Heat the cooking oil in a skillet and cook the double-fry KFC chicken bits until crispy.
Add the low-sodium chicken seasoning, Dijon mustard, and scallions to the skillet and stir to combine.
Pour the beaten eggs over the skillet mixture and cook until the edges start to set.
Sprinkle the grated cheddar cheese over the eggs and transfer the skillet to the oven.
Bake the frittata for 15 minutes or until the cheese is melted and the eggs are cooked through.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Slice the frittata into wedges and serve hot.
